name: Convention Hall
description: Convention Hall is a place to play pickleball in Sedalia, MO. There are 4 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Heckart outdoor pickleball court
description: Heckart outdoor pickleball court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sedalia, MO. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Sedalia Parks & Recreation
description: Sedalia Parks & Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Sedalia, MO. There are 9 asphalt and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and locker rooms. The courts can be reserved.
